description: Ensure a successful real estate viewing with this sleek email template. Designed with a light, green and orange color scheme, it effortlessly combines style and functionality. The sans serif typography lends a modern feel while the inclusion of property details, agent information, and telephone contact ensures all crucial details are covered. Key features include a confirmation section for scheduled visits and an "add to calendar" option for seamless scheduling. The template also links to Google Maps, providing an accurate location and map of the property's address. Ideal for service promotion in the real estate industry, this template ensures every house viewing is a step closer to a successful sale.
short_description: Ensure successful real estate viewings with this stylish, functional email template. Features include property details, agent info, confirmation for scheduled visits, "add to calendar" option, and Google Maps link for accurate location. Ideal for service promotion in real estate.

designer.description: I've started to use Photoshop when I was 13. From 2009 to 2014, I've been a part of 5 Art Groups, doing Illustrations and Photo-manipulations, collaborating with over 150 Artists from all the Planet. In 2014, during my final school's exams, I've got my first Freelance Job at a Milan based Agency. Thanks to that first project, I started my Career as a Freelance Independent UI & Web Designer. Today, I help brands improve their online and digital presence, building usable, unique & beautiful products, mostly collaborating with Italian & US Agencies and Startups.
